---
title: "Fabian Kalleitner"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:fabian.kalleitner@lmu.de
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/fabiankal
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.at/citations?user=NoQflXIAAAAJ
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/kalf.bsky.social
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1196-824X
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} ResearchGate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Fabian-Kalleitner
---

## Fabian Kalleitner

Postdoctoral Researcher at [LMU Munich](https://www.soziologie.lmu.de/en/our-department/faculty-and-staff/contact-page/fabian-kalleitner-e069e205.html)

My research interests include tax preferences, biased perceptions, fairness attitudes, and work values. To gather insights in these topics I combine theories and insights of sociology, economics, and psychology using various methodological approaches (i.e. panel surveys, multilevel analyses, survey/field/laboratory experiments) and estimation strategies.

[Learn more about me →](about.qmd)
